title: Medical Grade PRP Nano-Needling Facial
description:
PRP facials, also known as Platelet-Rich Plasma facials are renowned for their remarkable rejuvenating effects on the skin.

Paige is a licensed Phlebotomist. She will draw your blood, place in centrifuge and exact your PRP to use for treatment.

This innovative treatment uses the patient's own blood, enriched with concentrated platelets, to stimulate collagen production and cell regeneration. The result is a visibly smoother, firmer, and more radiant complexion.

PRP facials effectively reduce fine lines, wrinkles, and acne scars while improving overall skin texture and tone. With minimal downtime and natural ingredients, PRP facials offer a safe and highly effective solution for those seeking youthful, glowing skin.

$450

Book Now!

title: Medical Grade PRP Microneedling Treatment
description:
Medical Grade PRP Microneedling combines the rejuvenating power of microneedling with the healing properties of Platelet-Rich Plasma (PRP) to deliver exceptional skin renewal. This advanced treatment uses your own PRP to boost collagen production, smooth fine lines, improve skin texture, and reduce the appearance of scars. The result? Firmer, younger-looking skin with a radiant, healthy glow.

Experience the ultimate in skin rejuvenation with Medical Grade PRP Microneedling and see transformative, long-lasting results.

BOOK NOW!

title: PDRN (Salmon Sperm) Microneedling
description:
Experience the ultimate skin rejuvenation with PDRN (Salmon Sperm) Microneedling. This advanced treatment combines the healing power of Platelet-Rich Deoxyribonucleic Acid (PDRN) derived from salmon sperm with microneedling technology to target deep layers of the skin. PDRN helps stimulate collagen production, promote skin regeneration, and repair damaged tissue, leaving you with smoother, firmer, and more youthful skin. This treatment is ideal for: Fine lines & wrinkles, Acne scars, Uneven skin texture, Hyperpigmentation.

There may be mild redness and slight swelling in the treated area for 1-2 days following the procedure. Skin may feel tight or dry, and some light peeling or flaking can occur within the following few days. Full recovery usually takes about 3-5 days, depending on individual skin response.

$450

Nano-needling facials, a less invasive alternative to traditional microneedling, offer a range of benefits for skin health and appearance. Nano-needling facials are an excellent option for individuals looking to improve their skin's health and appearance with minimal discomfort and downtime.

This treatment has that European style scalp, décolletage, hand and arm massage. This treatment will leave you feeling improved Skin Texture, Even Skin Tone and Enhanced Product Absorption.

title: Lash Lift + Tint + Keratin
description:
Elleebana's lash lamination is a chemical process that can make lashes look longer, thicker, and darker, and requires less maintenance than eyelash extensions. The lamination can make the base of the lash look straight and the end look twisted or crooked. The effects can last up to 6–8 weeks, but may only last a few weeks for some clients who shed their lashes more during certain seasons.

Elleebana's Elleeplex Profusion is a vegan-friendly lash and brow lamination system that can be used to lift lashes and laminate brows with the same product. The system contains a Cysteamine Hydrochloride formula to maintain lash bond integrity and a lash damage defense system to minimize over processing. It also includes Elleeplex ReGEN, which contains amino acid technology and plant extracts to keep lashes and brows healthy during chemical treatments.

$95

Book Now!

title: Brow Lamination + Tint + Clean Up
description:
Elleebana brow lamination is a treatment that uses a product called Elleeplex Profusion to make eyebrows appear fuller, more defined, and smoother. The treatment involves applying two to three solutions to the eyebrows to restructure the brow hair and give it a more uniform shape. The lamination lotions swell and raise the hair cuticles, making them more porous and able to absorb tint more quickly. Paige uses Belmacil Tinting, a superior Swiss formulation and ten luxurious colors to choose from paired with wax and tweeze clean up!

Elleeplex Profusion is gentle, effective, fast, and vegan-friendly. It contains cysteamine HCL and no thioglycolate, and it minimizes over-processing. Elleeplex Profusion is designed to: Straighten brow hairs, Strengthen, hydrate, and protect, Last up to 6 to 8 weeks, Reduce the chance of irregular grow out.

$80

title: Teen Facial
description:
A teen facial is a skincare treatment specifically tailored to address the unique needs of adolescent skin. This gentle yet effective service typically includes a thorough cleansing, exfoliation, extractions, and hydration to combat common teen skin concerns such as acne, excess oil, and congestion. By using products and techniques suited for sensitive and changing skin, a teen facial helps promote a clear, balanced, and healthy complexion, boosting confidence and encouraging good skincare habits for the future.
